ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "track_layout" TEXT /* Description of the track layout */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event took place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "total_laps" INTEGER /* Total number of laps in the event */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the driver belongs to */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model the driver uses */,
  "racing_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racing class the driver belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_racing_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("racing_class_id") REFERENCES racing_classes ("racing_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "car_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the car model */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car model */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity of the car model in liters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_classes" (
  "racing_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing class */,
  "racing_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racing class */,
  "min_weight" INTEGER /* Minimum weight of the car in kilograms */,
  "max_weight" INTEGER /* Maximum weight of the car in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racing_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Principal of the team */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the team in millions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the event */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Lap time of the driver */,
  "diff_from_first" REAL /* Difference in time from the first place driver */,
  "avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver in km/h */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_times" (
  "lap_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap time */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lap */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES event_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_standings" (
  "driver_standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver after the event */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_permissions" (
  "event_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_permissions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
